message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My task: add optional path_transform parameter to template loaders (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) in src/jinja2/loaders.py. This is the only file I need to touch. What does your feature touch?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Adding fallback_searchpath to FileSystemLoader; I need to own loaders.py. Let me know your feature and if you need this file too.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Both our features only touch loaders.py so a disjoint split isn't possible here. Agreeing to shared ownership: we'll each implement independently on our own branches (my path_transform param, your fallback_searchpath param), keep changes additive/localized to minimize conflicts, and resolve any merge conflicts manually during the required final merge step. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: We both must touch loaders.py (unavoidable overlap - your path_transform touches all loaders, my fallback_searchpath touches FileSystemLoader). Plan: I will only modify FileSystemLoader.__init__ (adding fallback_searchpath param AFTER existing searchpath/encoding/followlinks params, at the end of the signature), FileSystemLoader.get_source(), and FileSystemLoader.list_templates(). I won't touch DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader or other FileSystemLoader internals. Please add your path_transform params at the end of each __init__ signature too, after any params I add to FileSystemLoader, to reduce signature conflicts. We'll each commit to our own branch and merge via git afterward, resolving any textual conflicts manually. Proceeding to implement now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: fallback_searchpath implementation complete in FileSystemLoader (__init__, get_source, list_templates). Tests pass. Ready to merge whenever you're done.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Implemented path_transform param across BaseLoader-derived loaders (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) via a shared _transform_template_path helper. Added path_transform as the LAST kwarg in each __init__ signature. All 841 existing tests pass. Committing to my branch now; will merge team/agent1 before finalizing patch.txt. Let me know when your fallback_searchpath work is done.
